subcodes.title: Words to Dr Henderson, spoken on 1912-07-31
subcodes.first_line: Everything praiseworthy spreads rapidly. But the children must first be taught religion so that they may be sincere and trustworthy.
subcodes.first_line_orig: هر چیز ممدوحی زود نشر میشود ولی اطفال را باید اول تعلیم دین نمود تا صادق و امین شوند
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness
